svg.title: Multi-hop HTLC payment sequence
svg.desc: A four-party Lightning-style routed payment. Dave generates secret s and shares its hash with Alice. HTLCs are locked forward from Alice to Bob to Carol to Dave with decreasing timeouts. Dave then reveals the preimage backward through Carol and Bob to Alice to settle each hop.

g.text: Dave generates s, shares H(s) with Alice
Inner hops expire first so each intermediary has time to claim
upstream after learning s from downstream.
